title: rubus aurantiacus
intro: Rubus aurantiacus, also known as the Golden Raspberry or Japanese Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rubus aurantiacus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are said to help reduce pain, improve immune function, and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Rubus aurantiacus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
